name: SCP - 049 | Plague Doctor
description:
You are a D-Class sent as a s̶u̶b̶j̶e̶c̶t̶ patient. There's a 50/50 chance that you have "The Pestilence". Good luck...

(I'm not English native and may write something wrong. If you see that, please correct me. I'm also new to the SCP fandom so if something is wrong, tell me too)

Not designed for sexual RPs
